description: Full-page layout system with a sticky-capable top header, a collapsible sidebar, a fluid main content area, and a footer. Unlike AppShell, this is flex-based and supports scrolling documents. Perfect for admin panels, dashboards, and documentation sites.
emmet: div[data-header-layout]>(header[data-sticky]>div[data-flex data-align=center data-gap=sm]>strong{App Name}+div[data-cluster=xs]>button[data-intent=primary]{Sign Out})+(div[data-body]>(aside>nav[data-stack=xs]>(div[data-flex data-align=center data-gap=sm]>span{🏠}+span[data-label]{Dashboard})+(div[data-flex data-align=center data-gap=sm]>span{👥}+span[data-label]{Users})+(div[data-flex data-align=center data-gap=sm]>span{⚙️}+span[data-label]{Settings}))+(main[data-stack=md]>h1{Page Title}+p{Main content here}))+(footer>small{© 2026 Dashboard})

data-header-layout.agent_hint: Activates the header layout flex container. Bare attribute, no value needed.

data-sticky.agent_hint: Apply to the <header> child to make it sticky at the top of the viewport. Bare attribute.

data-body.agent_hint: Required wrapper div that contains the aside and main elements. Manages horizontal flex layout.

data-collapsed.agent_hint: Apply to <aside> to collapse the sidebar to icon-only width (4.5rem). Hides all [data-label] text children.

data-label.agent_hint: Apply to text labels inside aside nav items. Hidden automatically when aside has data-collapsed.

--ix-sidebar-width.agent_hint: CSS custom property controlling the sidebar width when expanded. Override in your stylesheet.

header.agent_hint: Top navigation bar. Add data-sticky to pin it. Use data-flex inside for brand/nav/action layout.

body.agent_hint: Required wrapper with data-body attribute. Must contain the aside and main children.

sidebar.agent_hint: Left sidebar inside data-body. Add data-collapsed to reduce to icon-only mode. Tag labels with data-label.

main.agent_hint: Fluid main content area inside data-body. Grows to fill remaining horizontal space.

footer.agent_hint: Bottom footer bar below the body. Centered text and muted color by default.

do: Always wrap aside and main inside a div[data-body]
Add data-sticky to header for pinned top navigation
Tag sidebar link labels with data-label so they hide on data-collapsed
Use data-stack=xs inside aside for vertical navigation items
Use data-flex inside sidebar items to align icon + label
Use --ix-sidebar-width to control expanded sidebar width
dont: Do not place aside or main directly under data-header-layout without data-body wrapper
Do not use data-header-layout for fixed-height viewport apps — use data-appshell instead
Do not manually set width on aside — use data-collapsed or --ix-sidebar-width

examples.label: Full header layout with sticky header and sidebar
